personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Platform Support Engineer | Big Data, SQL, Python, Observability

summary: Senior data platform and observability engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience supporting production systems, data pipelines, telemetry platforms, and engineering customers in complex environments. Strong background in Python, SQL, Linux/Unix, Spark/PySpark, Hadoop/Hive concepts, production troubleshooting, runbooks, automation, technical documentation, and customer-facing issue resolution. Experienced turning monitoring and platform data into actionable support workflows, dashboards, and reliability improvements across regulated financial-services environments. Currently expanding modern big data platform fluency across Iceberg, Kafka, Flink, Trino/Druid concepts, and GenAI support automation while keeping delivery grounded in practical support, evidence-based troubleshooting, and clear communication.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported production Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented data pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, replacing manual data preparation with repeatable operational workflows.

Provided production troubleshooting and root-cause analysis across monitoring feeds, reporting pipelines, and capacity datasets, using SQL, Python, logs, dashboards, and stakeholder feedback to resolve data breaks and platform issues.

Integrated BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics data into unified reporting pipelines, improving visibility for engineering teams and reducing friction in capacity and performance investigations.

Developed ML forecasting and analytics workflows with Prophet, scikit-learn, SQL, and curated telemetry datasets, supporting evidence-based operational decisions months ahead of expected capacity risk.

Created dashboards and operational reports using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, SQL, and Python to make complex infrastructure and telemetry issues understandable for technical and leadership audiences.
Supported AWS-oriented modernization using S3 landing zones, Glue, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and cloud data platform patterns for scalable processing and reporting workloads.
Documented operational processes, validation checks, and troubleshooting workflows for recurring data issues, helping teams understand pipeline behavior and support expectations.
Worked in a regulated banking environment where data quality, completeness, reliability, and communication during production incidents were critical to stakeholder trust.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems, providing engineering support, troubleshooting, and documentation for production monitoring issues.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to surface optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, improving support visibility into user-impacting performance problems.
Partnered with engineering teams during AWS migration planning, contributing observability readiness, platform behavior analysis, and support-oriented feedback.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting platform reliability and customer-facing issue resolution.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules used by application and operations teams to diagnose performance issues and reduce support ambiguity.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation scripts for performance reporting, replacing manual exports and improving repeatability of support data collection.
Created technical documentation and delivered training for internal teams and client users, improving self-service knowledge and onboarding for monitoring platform workflows.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, database, and operations teams to troubleshoot bottlenecks, analyze telemetry, and communicate root-cause findings clearly.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits and resource bottlenecks involving JDBC pools, threads, heap memory, CPU, and garbage collection.
Installed and configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and Thread Dump automation scripts to support production-like performance troubleshooting.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release and support decisions.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Programming & Scripting: Python, SQL, PySpark, Pandas, Perl, Korn Shell, Java, C++, PL/SQL
skills.Big Data & Data Platforms: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive concepts, Parquet, distributed data processing, warehouse/lakehouse concepts, Iceberg concepts, Kafka/Flink concepts, Trino/Druid awareness
skills.Support & Troubleshooting: Production support, incident analysis, root-cause analysis, SQL troubleshooting, log review, support automation, escalation handling, customer-facing issue resolution, evidence-based decision making
skills.Automation & Tooling: Python automation, shell scripting, reporting automation, support workflow automation, Git, CI/CD concepts, Linux/Unix, Docker concepts
skills.Observability / APM: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, dashboards, alerts, thresholds
skills.Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, cloud infrastructure concepts, container orchestration awareness
skills.Data Quality & Analytics: Data validation, reconciliation, completeness checks, telemetry analytics, capacity forecasting, ML forecasting, scikit-learn, Prophet, operational reporting
skills.Documentation & Enablement: Runbooks, technical documentation, knowledge base content, developer/customer education, training, stakeholder communication, cross-functional collaboration
skills.GenAI / Support Enablement: RAG concepts, vector embeddings, FAISS, LLM APIs, prompt workflows, agentic automation projects, GenAI support automation concepts

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic workflow with Python, semantic duplicate detection, vector embeddings, LLM scoring, JSON quality gates, and structured support-style documentation for repeatable operation.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark-oriented forecasting platform for banking-scale telemetry, turning raw operational data into curated datasets, forecasts, and dashboards for decision support.

projects.name: Enterprise APM Support & Knowledge Enablement
projects.description: Delivered support workflows, dashboards, thresholds, runbooks, training, and automated reporting for large-scale APM and telemetry platforms across financial-services environments.
